title: Spinning Items Displayer Mod
description: A RPG like way to Display the Items at the Left of the Inventory when you hover it.
body:
(1.0 - The Item Displayer isn't RPG like, it's so simple, it's only the Item Model Spinning slowly and it marks the Stack and shows the Name of the Item)



(1.1 - The Item Displayer now is RPG like, it's the same that 1.0 but with background making it RPG like, and low quality blocks, sorry i can't make it 3D Models like 1.0 😔😔😔😔)
